description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after a cartoon penguin, featuring a rounded black body with a white belly and face. The toy has large, expressive eyes with black pupils and white sclera, giving it a slightly surprised or concerned look. Its beak and webbed feet are a soft yellow color, contrasting with the darker body. The wings are short and stubby, extending slightly from the sides of the body. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall shape is smooth and rounded with no sharp edges. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, rounded cartoon penguin stuffed toy with a black body, white belly, yellow beak, and feet, featuring large expressive eyes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the penguin's face, white belly, yellow beak, and both feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded black back, side of the beak, and one foot.
description_view_2: Top view displays the smooth, oval-shaped black back and both wings extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the rounded back, side of the beak, and one foot, mirroring the left side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with large, wide-open eyes and slightly arched brows, giving a look of mild surprise or curiosity. There is no visible mouth.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is standing upright with its wings slightly extended to the sides and both feet flat on the ground.
